mapper.sql: ROrderNo, ROrderItem, Id, RecNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, Account, DlvDate, RcvClassify, PrjCode, CProductNo, StockCode, ExpInvCode, SpcPrice, OrdTransType, SpecMark, Discount, DlvEntire, TransFee, TransChannel, DlvSite, DlvType1, DlvType2, DlvType3, DlvType4, ContractNo, QuotationNo, CQueryNo, COrderNo, Remark, OpLog, WorkDay, Sendout, Status, SendDay, NoPrice, DetailMark, OptDate, LocationNo, name, mobile, address, zipCode, orderType, OrderSourceEntity, GZOrderNo, UpdateTime, AddressId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.OrderSales_GZ
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.OrderSales_GZ (ROrderNo, ROrderItem, Id, RecNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, Account, DlvDate, RcvClassify, PrjCode, CProductNo, StockCode, ExpInvCode, mapper.update:
update dbo.OrderSales_GZ
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderItem = #{record.rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR},
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
RecNo = #{record.recno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Account = #{record.account,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvClassify = #{record.rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
CProductNo = #{record.cproductno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},

Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DOUBLE},

TransChannel = #{record.transchannel,jdbcType=CHAR},

DlvType2 = #{record.dlvtype2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType3 = #{record.dlvtype3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType4 = #{record.dlvtype4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CQueryNo = #{record.cqueryno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COrderNo = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OpLog = #{record.oplog,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

Sendout = #{record.sendout,jdbcType=CHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=CHAR},
SendDay = #{record.sendday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
NoPrice = #{record.noprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
DetailMark = #{record.detailmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

mobile = #{record.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
zipCode = #{record.zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderType = #{record.ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrderSourceEntity = #{record.ordersourceentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GZOrderNo = #{record.gzorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
AddressId = #{record.addressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.OrderSales_GZ
Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
RecNo = #{recno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Account = #{account,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate = #{dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvClassify = #{rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{prjcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
CProductNo = #{cproductno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ExpInvCode = #{expinvcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpcPrice = #{spcprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrdTransType = #{ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpecMark = #{specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
Discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
DlvEntire = #{dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransChannel = #{transchannel,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvSite = #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvType1 = #{dlvtype1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType2 = #{dlvtype2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType3 = #{dlvtype3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType4 = #{dlvtype4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{contractno,jdbcType=CHAR},
QuotationNo = #{quotationno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CQueryNo = #{cqueryno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COrderNo = #{corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OpLog = #{oplog,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WorkDay = #{workday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Sendout = #{sendout,jdbcType=CHAR},
Status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
SendDay = #{sendday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
NoPrice = #{noprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
DetailMark = #{detailmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptDate = #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LocationNo = #{locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
zipCode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderType = #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrderSourceEntity = #{ordersourceentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GZOrderNo = #{gzorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
AddressId = #{addressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ROrderNo = #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ROrderItem = #{rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR}
